description: Implement global search bar for product catalog
acceptance_criteria: Locate the search input field with data-testid='search-input'.
Type a valid product name from the seed data into the input.
Press Enter or click the search icon.
Verify the URL updates to include query params (?q=...).
Verify the product list filters to show only matching items.
Verify data-testid='product-card' appears for each result.
Clear the search and verify all products return.
